Moin moin

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update graphics/poppler to 21.12.

The patch is attached and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-graphics-poppler-update-to-22.12.patch


mfg Tobias
